keymap.resetTooltip: Reset all layers to factory default
keymap.dongleBody: The wireless dongle only forwards keystrokes. Connect a USB-C cable to read battery and configure keymap / macros / lighting.
macros.footer: Plain-text macros type the characters. Bind a macro to a key on the Keymap tab — search M0…M15 in the picker. Advanced macros (key combos / delays) are preserved but edited in VIA.
light.colorNote: Color applies to color-capable effects (Solid, Splash, Reactive…).
light.saveNote: Changes apply live; Save writes them to the keyboard's memory so they survive a power cycle.
info.chargingNote: On the cable the pack is charging, so % reads high. The truest charge is the resting value below.
info.dongleNote: The 2.4GHz dongle reports battery only when the keyboard (re)connects. Plug a USB cable for a live reading.
about.title: Keychron V1 Max Tool
about.desc: Battery monitor + VIA configurator — keymap, macros and lighting for the Keychron V1 Max over the VIA raw-HID protocol.
about.note: Live battery uses the custom 0xA4 firmware command over USB. The 2.4GHz dongle reports battery only at (re)connect.
settings.title: Settings
status.dongleConfigure: 2.4GHz dongle — connect a USB cable to configure
status.donglePlug: 2.4GHz dongle — plug cable for a live reading
